description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a classic silhouette, featuring a textured white canvas upper and a rubber sole. The shoe has visible laces running through metal eyelets, and the toe cap is reinforced with a slightly discolored rubber material. On the outer ankle area, there is a circular patch with a star logo and text, characteristic of Converse Chuck Taylor All Star shoes. The shoe shows signs of wear, with some dirt and scuff marks, especially on the toe and sole. The overall structure appears intact, with the collar and tongue maintaining their shape, and the interior is likely lined with fabric for comfort.
description: A white, high-top canvas sneaker with visible laces, a rubber sole, and a circular logo patch on the side, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the textured canvas, laces, and slightly dirty rubber sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lacing, toe cap, and overall symmetry of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the circular logo patch and more pronounced wear on the sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel and the high-top collar, with minimal detailing.
attribute_logo: Circular patch with a star and text on the outer ankle area, gray in color.
